Package com.github.scribejava.oidc

Class OidcServiceBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.github.scribejava.core.builder.ServiceBuilder
      • com.github.scribejava.oidc.OidcServiceBuilder
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ServiceBuilderCommon, ServiceBuilderOAuth20
    public class OidcServiceBuilder
extends ServiceBuilder
    Builder spécifique pour les services OpenID Connect (Support Discovery).
